-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UserSearch]
    @SearchTerm nvarchar(100),
    @IncludeInactive bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Wrapper procedure (public SQL API)
    -- Routes to specialized worker procedures based on parameter values

    IF 1 = 0
    BEGIN
        EXEC [dbo].[UserSearch_active]
            @SearchTerm = @SearchTerm,
        @IncludeInactive = @IncludeInactive;
        RETURN;
    END

    ELSE IF 1 = 0
    BEGIN
        EXEC [dbo].[UserSearch_all]
            @SearchTerm = @SearchTerm,
        @IncludeInactive = @IncludeInactive;
        RETURN;
    END

    EXEC [dbo].[UserSearch_active]
        @SearchTerm = @SearchTerm,
        @IncludeInactive = @IncludeInactive;
END
GO
